What if I go to the grave
“I wish you would hide me in the grave

14.note: Hebrew Why should I take my flesh in my teeth.

15.anchor: God might kill me, but I have no other hope.

13.anchor: but he will bring justice if you will only wait.
13.note: These verses can also be translated as follows: Indeed, God doesn’t listen to their empty plea; / the Almighty is not concerned. / How much less will he listen when you say you don’t see him, / and that your case is before him and you’re waiting for justice.

15.anchor: and is not greatly concerned about wickedness.
